children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise available for such purposes, there are authorized to be appropriated to the President, for the purpose of furnishing nonmilitary assistance for Central American countries, $1,200,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1988 and 1989, which are authorized to remain available until expended.

For the purpose of providing the assistance described in subsection (a), funds appropriated pursuant to the authorizations in that subsection may be transferred by the President for obligation in accordance with the authorities of subchapter I of this chapter (including part IV of subchapter II of this chapter), the Peace Corps Act [

children.tail: et seq.], the Migration and Refugee Assistance Act of 1962 [
et seq.], the United States Information and Education Exchange Act of 1948 [
et seq.], the Mutual Educational and Cultural Exchange Act of 1961 [
et seq.], the National Endowment for Democracy Act [
et seq.], and the State Department Basic Authorities Act of 1956.

children.text: References to Subchapter I Deemed To Include Certain Parts of Subchapter II

References to subchapter I of this chapter are deemed to include parts IV (§ 2346 et seq.), VI (§ 2348 et seq.), and VIII (§ 2349aa et seq.) of subchapter II of this chapter, and references to subchapter II are deemed to exclude such parts. See

children.tail: , set out as a note under
, and sections 2348c and 2349aa–5 of this title.
